HOME FR0M YOUNG MAN WHO SAID HE CHRIS PHILLIPS, SON OF DAVE
PHILLIPS. HE SA1D HE ON VACATION AND REOESTEE INF0 0N WHAT
PHILLIPS. HE SAID HE ON VACATION AND REQUESTED INFO ON WHAT
ro SE AND D0 IN MADRID AREA. ALS0 ASKED IF PGLITICAL SITUAT1ON
TO SEE AND DO IN MADRID AREA. ALSO ASKED IF POLITICAL SITUATION
IN PORTUGAL SC TAT TRAVEL THERE 0LD EE N6 PR0BLE. IKAL-
IN PORTUGAL SUCH THAT TRAVEL THERE WOULD BE NO PROBLEM. KAL-
BINQWAS ON WAY T0 MEETING AND ASKED THAT HE CALL BACK LATER.
BING WAS ON WAY TO MEETING AND ASKED THAT HE CALL BACK LATER.
HE D1D, AND SAiL HE TAVELING T0 LIS8ON TAT NIGHI AND W6LD
HE DID, AND SAID HE TRAVELING TO LISBON THAT NIGHT AND WOULD
RETURN MADR1D LATER IN WEEK. HE SAID E DID T HAVE ADDRESS
RETURN MADRID LATER IN WEEK. HE SAID HE DID NOT HAVE ADDRESS

IN MADRID AT MOMENT AND WOULD CALL KALBING AGAIN UPON RETURN
. WESOEWAT SUSPIC1OUS THIS CALL SINCE KALE ING]OES
2: WE SOMEWHAT SUSPICIOUS THIS CALL SINCE KALBING DOES
NOT KNOW CRIS PHILLIPS, ALTHUGH 17 PUSSISLE HIS FATHER GAVE
NOT KNOW CHRIS PHILLIPS, ALTHOUGH IT POSSIBLE HIS FATHER GAVE
H1lKALIG'SNAME AS SOMEONE T0 HELP iN W1TH TOURIST 2UES-
